detaileddescription.para: Constructs an array of empty (default-constructed) instances, of the specified size. Will never return null. The array must be destroyed using MR_FreeArray(). Use MR_Color_OffsetMutablePtr() and MR_Color_OffsetPtr() to access the array elements.
Generated from constructor MR::Color::Color. Parameter _1 can not be null. It is a single object. The reference to the parameter _1 might be preserved in the constructed object.

memberdef.argsstring: (int r, int g, int b, int a)
memberdef.name: MR_Color_Construct_4_int

memberdef.argsstring: (float r, float g, float b, float a)
